info.title: Komga Rust API
info.description: Rust implementation of Komga media server for comics/manga. REST API for managing libraries, series, books, read progress, readlists, collections, and more.

get.summary: Check if the server has been claimed

200.description: Paginated list of series in library

post.summary: Mark all books in series as read

delete.summary: Clear read progress for all books in series

get.summary: Get Tachiyomi read progress for series

put.summary: Update Tachiyomi read progress for series

200.description: ZIP file containing all books in series

delete.summary: Delete series and all its books from disk

200.description: Paginated list of books in series

get.summary: Get read progress for a book

patch.summary: Update read progress for a book

delete.summary: Delete read progress for a book

200.description: ZIP file containing all books in readlist

get.summary: Get Tachiyomi sync progress for readlist

put.summary: Update Tachiyomi sync progress for readlist

tags.name: Series
tags.description: Series listing, metadata, read progress, Tachiyomi sync

tags.name: Books
tags.description: Book listing, pages, reading progress, covers, import

tags.name: ReadLists
tags.description: Read list CRUD, books, thumbnails, Tachiyomi sync

tags.name: Search
tags.description: Full-text search across books and series

tags.description: Server and client settings, page hashes
